gist.headline: Model monitor gets a glow-up
gist.blurb: We've completely revamped the model monitor UI! Now with clickable health cards, better sorting, and new 24-hour and 7-day views to keep an eye on the hive's heartbeat.
gist.summary: The model monitor UI has been upgraded with interactive health summary cards, improved sorting, responsive layouts, and new 24-hour and 7-day aggregation windows.
gist.impact: Users can now easily filter models by health status, view historical performance over longer timeframes, and enjoy a much cleaner, mobile-friendly interface.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about monitoring, health, dashboards, and UI improvements. The Monitor Robot is the perfect character here since its head is literally a monitor. Polly the Bee can be interacting with the robot, perhaps polishing its screen or looking at colorful health charts displayed on it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot polishing the screen of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen displays colorful bar charts and a glowing lime green (#ecf874) heart icon. Soft pastel gradient background in mint and lavender. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
